top3.sql:
SELECT language
FROM foreign_data
WHERE multiverseid IN (
    SELECT multiverseid
    FROM foreign_data
    WHERE uuid IN (
        SELECT uuid
        FROM cards
        WHERE setCode IN (
            SELECT code
            FROM sets
            WHERE block = 'Ravnica'
        )
    )
)
GROUP BY language
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT multiverseid) = 180;

SELECT DISTINCT language
FROM foreign_data
WHERE uuid IN (
    SELECT uuid
    FROM cards
    WHERE setCode IN (
        SELECT code
        FROM sets
        WHERE block = 'Ravnica'
    )
)
AND language != 'en';

SELECT language
FROM foreign_data
WHERE multiverseid IN (
    SELECT multiverseid
    FROM foreign_data
    WHERE uuid IN (
        SELECT uuid
        FROM cards
        WHERE setCode IN (
            SELECT code
            FROM sets
            WHERE block = 'Ravnica'
        )
    )
)
GROUP BY language
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT multiverseid) = 180;

SELECT language
FROM foreign_data
WHERE uuid IN (
    SELECT c.uuid
    FROM cards c
    JOIN sets s ON c.setCode = s.code
    WHERE s.block = 'Ravnica'
)
GROUP BY language
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT multiverseid) = 180;

SELECT DISTINCT language
FROM set_translations st
JOIN sets s ON st.setCode = s.code
WHERE s.block = 'Ravnica';

    WHERE s.block = 'Ravnica'
)
GROUP BY language

SELECT DISTINCT language
FROM set_translations st
JOIN sets s ON st.setCode = s.code
WHERE s.block = 'Ravnica';

final.sql:
SELECT language
FROM foreign_data
WHERE multiverseid IN (
    SELECT multiverseid
    FROM foreign_data
    WHERE uuid IN (
        SELECT uuid
        FROM cards
        WHERE setCode IN (
            SELECT code
            FROM sets
            WHERE block = 'Ravnica'
        )
    )
)
GROUP BY language
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT multiverseid) = 180;
